```
const express = require('express');
const router = express.Router();

// Mock NADRA database - in production this would be a real database
const mockNadraDatabase = [
  {
    cnic: '12345-6789012-3',
    name: 'John Doe',
    fatherName: 'Jane Doe',
    dateOfBirth: '1990-01-01',
    address: '123 Main St, Karachi',
    fingerprintHash: 'mock_fingerprint_hash_123', // In real scenario, this would be biometric data
    status: 'active'
  },
  {
    cnic: '98765-4321098-7',
    name: 'Alice Smith',
    fatherName: 'Bob Smith',
    dateOfBirth: '1985-05-15',
    address: '456 Oak Ave, Lahore',
    fingerprintHash: 'mock_fingerprint_hash_456',
    status: 'active'
  },
  // Add more mock data as needed
];

/**
 * POST /api/nadra/verify-user
 * Verify user existence in NADRA database
 */
router.post('/verify-user', async (req, res) => {
  try {
    const { cnic, name, fatherName, dateOfBirth } = req.body;

    if (!cnic) {
      return res.status(400).json({ error: 'CNIC is required' });
    }

    // Find user in mock database
    const user = mockNadraDatabase.find(u => u.cnic === cnic);

    if (!user) {
      return res.status(404).json({
        verified: false,
        message: 'User not found in NADRA database'
      });
    }

    // Optional: Verify additional details if provided
    let detailsMatch = true;
    if (name && user.name.toLowerCase() !== name.toLowerCase()) {
      detailsMatch = false;
    }
    if (fatherName && user.fatherName.toLowerCase() !== fatherName.toLowerCase()) {
      detailsMatch = false;
    }
    if (dateOfBirth && user.dateOfBirth !== dateOfBirth) {
      detailsMatch = false;
    }

    res.json({
      verified: detailsMatch,
      user: detailsMatch ? {
        cnic: user.cnic,
        name: user.name,
        fatherName: user.fatherName,
        dateOfBirth: user.dateOfBirth,
        address: user.address,
        status: user.status
      } : null,
      message: detailsMatch ? 'User verified successfully' : 'User details do not match'
    });

  } catch (error) {
    console.error('[Error] NADRA User Verification:', error);
    res.status(500).json({ error: 'Verification failed' });
  }
});

/**
 * POST /api/nadra/verify-fingerprint
 * Verify fingerprint against NADRA database
 */
router.post('/verify-fingerprint', async (req, res) => {
  try {
    const { cnic, fingerprintImage } = req.body;

    if (!cnic || !fingerprintImage) {
      return res.status(400).json({ error: 'CNIC and fingerprint image are required' });
    }

    // Find user in mock database
    const user = mockNadraDatabase.find(u => u.cnic === cnic);

    if (!user) {
      return res.status(404).json({
        verified: false,
        message: 'User not found in NADRA database'
      });
    }

    // In a real implementation, this would involve:
    // 1. Extract biometric features from the fingerprint image
    // 2. Compare with stored biometric template
    // 3. Use biometric matching algorithms

    // For mock purposes, we'll simulate fingerprint verification
    // In reality, you'd use libraries like OpenCV, or biometric SDKs
    const mockFingerprintMatch = Math.random() > 0.1; // 90% success rate for demo

    res.json({
      verified: mockFingerprintMatch,
      user: mockFingerprintMatch ? {
        cnic: user.cnic,
        name: user.name,
        status: user.status
      } : null,
      message: mockFingerprintMatch ? 'Fingerprint verified successfully' : 'Fingerprint does not match'
    });

  } catch (error) {
    console.error('[Error] NADRA Fingerprint Verification:', error);
    res.status(500).json({ error: 'Fingerprint verification failed' });
  }
});

/**
 * GET /api/nadra/user/:cnic
 * Get user details from NADRA (for internal use)
 */
router.get('/user/:cnic', async (req, res) => {
  try {
    const { cnic } = req.params;

    const user = mockNadraDatabase.find(u => u.cnic === cnic);

    if (!user) {
      return res.status(404).json({ error: 'User not found' });
    }

    res.json({
      cnic: user.cnic,
      name: user.name,
      fatherName: user.fatherName,
      dateOfBirth: user.dateOfBirth,
      address: user.address,
      status: user.status
    });

  } catch (error) {
    console.error('[Error] NADRA Get User:', error);
    res.status(500).json({ error: 'Failed to retrieve user data' });
  }
});

module.exports = router;
```

```
// SIGNUP endpoint
router.post('/signup', validateSignup, async (req, res) => {
  try {
    const { email, password, name, fatherName, cnic, cnicIssueDate, dateOfBirth } = req.body;

    // Check if user already exists in Firestore
    const userDoc = await db.collection('users').doc(cnic).get();
    if (userDoc.exists) {
      return res.status(400).json({ error: 'User with this CNIC already exists' });
    }

    // Validate CNIC format (Pakistani CNIC: XXXXX-XXXXXXX-X or 13 digits)
    const cnicRegex = /^(\d{5}-\d{7}-\d{1}|\d{13})$/;
    if (!cnicRegex.test(cnic)) {
      return res.status(400).json({ error: 'Invalid CNIC format. Use XXXXX-XXXXXXX-X or 13 digits' });
    }

    // Verify user against NADRA database
    try {
      const nadraResult = await verifyUserWithNadra(cnic, name, fatherName, dateOfBirth);
      if (!nadraResult.verified) {
        return res.status(403).json({
          error: 'Identity verification failed',
          message: 'Your details do not match NADRA records. Please ensure your information is accurate.'
        });
      }
    } catch (nadraError) {
      console.error('NADRA verification failed during signup:', nadraError);
      return res.status(503).json({
        error: 'Identity verification service unavailable',
        message: 'Unable to verify your identity with NADRA. Please try again later.'
      });
    }
```

    // Verify password
    const passwordMatch = await bcrypt.compare(password, user.passwordHash);
    if (!passwordMatch) {
      // Increment login attempts
      await db.collection('users').doc(userDoc.id).update({
        loginAttempts: user.loginAttempts + 1,
        lastLoginAttempt: new Date()
      });

      return res.status(401).json({ error: 'Invalid CNIC or password' });
    }

    // NADRA re-verification at login (only if not already verified recently)
    try {
      const nadraResult = await verifyUserWithNadra(user.cnic, user.name, user.fatherName, user.dateOfBirth);
      if (!nadraResult.verified) {
        await auditLog({
          userId: userDoc.id,
          action: 'LOGIN_NADRA_VERIFICATION_FAILED',
          details: { cnic: user.cnic, timestamp: new Date().toISOString() },
          ipAddress: req.ip,
          userAgent: req.get('user-agent')
        });
        return res.status(403).json({
          error: 'Identity verification failed',
          message: 'Your identity could not be verified with NADRA records.'
        });
      }
    } catch (nadraError) {
      console.error('NADRA check during login failed:', nadraError);
      // Allow login if NADRA service is down but user is already nadraVerified
      if (!user.nadraVerified) {
        return res.status(503).json({
          error: 'Identity verification service unavailable. Please try again later.'
        });
      }
    }

```
'use client';

import { useState, useRef, useCallback, useEffect } from 'react';
import { Camera, RotateCcw, CheckCircle, AlertCircle, Fingerprint, X } from 'lucide-react';

interface FingerprintCaptureProps {
  cnic: string;
  onVerificationComplete: (verified: boolean, imageBase64: string) => void;
  onCancel: () => void;
}

type CaptureState = 'idle' | 'camera-active' | 'captured' | 'verifying' | 'verified' | 'failed';

export default function FingerprintCapture({ cnic, onVerificationComplete, onCancel }: FingerprintCaptureProps) {
  const [captureState, setCaptureState] = useState<CaptureState>('idle');
  const [capturedImage, setCapturedImage] = useState<string | null>(null);
  const [error, setError] = useState('');
  const [countdown, setCountdown] = useState(0);
  const videoRef = useRef<HTMLVideoElement>(null);
  const canvasRef = useRef<HTMLCanvasElement>(null);
  const streamRef = useRef<MediaStream | null>(null);
  const countdownRef = useRef<NodeJS.Timeout | null>(null);

  // Cleanup camera on unmount
  useEffect(() => {
    return () => {
      stopCamera();
      if (countdownRef.current) clearInterval(countdownRef.current);
    };
  }, []);

  const startCamera = async () => {
    try {
      setError('');
      const stream = await navigator.mediaDevices.getUserMedia({
        video: {
          facingMode: 'environment', // Use rear camera on mobile
          width: { ideal: 1280 },
          height: { ideal: 720 }
        }
      });

      streamRef.current = stream;
      if (videoRef.current) {
        videoRef.current.srcObject = stream;
        videoRef.current.play();
      }
      setCaptureState('camera-active');
    } catch (err: any) {
      setError('Could not access camera. Please allow camera permission and try again.');
      console.error('Camera error:', err);
    }
  };

  const stopCamera = () => {
    if (streamRef.current) {
      streamRef.current.getTracks().forEach(track => track.stop());
      streamRef.current = null;
    }
  };

  const captureImage = useCallback(() => {
    if (!videoRef.current || !canvasRef.current) return;

    const video = videoRef.current;
    const canvas = canvasRef.current;
    canvas.width = video.videoWidth;
    canvas.height = video.videoHeight;

    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
    if (!ctx) return;

    ctx.drawImage(video, 0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
    const imageDataUrl = canvas.toDataURL('image/jpeg', 0.9);

    setCapturedImage(imageDataUrl);
    stopCamera();
    setCaptureState('captured');
  }, []);

  const retake = () => {
    setCapturedImage(null);
    setCaptureState('idle');
    setError('');
  };

  const verifyFingerprint = async () => {
    if (!capturedImage) return;

    setCaptureState('verifying');
    setError('');

    try {
      const base64Image = capturedImage.split(',')[1]; // Remove data:image/jpeg;base64, prefix

      const response = await fetch(
        `${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL || 'http://localhost:3001'}/api/nadra/verify-fingerprint`,
        {
          method: 'POST',
          headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
          body: JSON.stringify({ cnic, fingerprintImage: base64Image }),
        }
      );

      const data = await response.json();

      if (data.verified) {
        setCaptureState('verified');
        setTimeout(() => {
          onVerificationComplete(true, base64Image);
        }, 1500);
      } else {
        setCaptureState('failed');
        setError(data.message || 'Fingerprint verification failed. Please try again.');
      }
    } catch (err) {
      setCaptureState('failed');
      setError('Verification service unavailable. Please try again.');
    }
  };

  return (
    <div className="fixed inset-0 bg-black/70 flex items-center justify-center z-50 p-4">
      <div className="bg-card rounded-2xl shadow-2xl w-full max-w-md border border-border">
        {/* Header */}
        <div className="flex items-center justify-between p-5 border-b border-border">
          <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
            <div className="bg-primary/10 p-2 rounded-lg">
              <Fingerprint className="text-primary" size={22} />
            </div>
            <div>
              <h2 className="font-bold text-foreground text-lg">Fingerprint Verification</h2>
              <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">Via NADRA Biometric System</p>
            </div>
          </div>
          <button
            onClick={onCancel}
            className="p-2 rounded-lg hover:bg-muted transition-colors text-muted-foreground"
          >
            <X size={20} />
          </button>
        </div>

        {/* Body */}
        <div className="p-5">
          {/* Idle State */}
          {captureState === 'idle' && (
            <div className="text-center space-y-4">
              <div className="bg-primary/5 rounded-xl p-6 border border-primary/20">
                <Fingerprint size={56} className="mx-auto text-primary mb-3 opacity-70" />
                <p className="text-sm text-foreground font-medium mb-1">
                  Biometric Verification Required
                </p>
                <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">
                  Place your finger flat on a light surface or directly on the camera lens,
                  then capture a clear image for NADRA verification.
                </p>
              </div>
              <div className="bg-muted rounded-lg p-3 text-left">
                <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground font-medium mb-1">Tips for best results:</p>
                <ul className="text-xs text-muted-foreground space-y-1 list-disc list-inside">
                  <li>Clean and dry your finger before scanning</li>
                  <li>Ensure good lighting</li>
                  <li>Press finger gently against camera</li>
                  <li>Hold still during capture</li>
                </ul>
              </div>
              {error && (
                <div className="bg-destructive/10 text-destructive text-sm p-3 rounded-lg flex items-center gap-2">
                  <AlertCircle size={16} />
                  {error}
                </div>
              )}
              <button
                onClick={startCamera}
                className="w-full bg-primary text-primary-foreground py-3 rounded-xl font-semibold hover:bg-primary/90 transition-colors flex items-center justify-center gap-2"
              >
                <Camera size={18} />
                Open Camera
              </button>
            </div>
          )}

          {/* Camera Active */}
          {captureState === 'camera-active' && (
            <div className="space-y-4">
              <div className="relative rounded-xl overflow-hidden bg-black border-2 border-primary aspect-video">
                <video
                  ref={videoRef}
                  autoPlay
                  playsInline
                  muted
                  className="w-full h-full object-cover"
                />
                {/* Fingerprint overlay guide */}
                <div className="absolute inset-0 flex items-center justify-center pointer-events-none">
                  <div className="border-2 border-primary/60 rounded-full w-32 h-32 flex items-center justify-center">
                    <Fingerprint size={48} className="text-primary/40" />
                  </div>
                </div>
                <div className="absolute top-2 right-2 bg-red-500 w-3 h-3 rounded-full animate-pulse" />
              </div>
              <p className="text-xs text-center text-muted-foreground">
                Position your finger within the circle and hold steady
              </p>
              <div className="flex gap-3">
                <button
                  onClick={retake}
                  className="flex-1 border border-border text-foreground py-3 rounded-xl font-semibold hover:bg-muted transition-colors flex items-center justify-center gap-2"
                >
                  <X size={16} />
                  Cancel
                </button>
                <button
                  onClick={captureImage}
                  className="flex-1 bg-primary text-primary-foreground py-3 rounded-xl font-semibold hover:bg-primary/90 transition-colors flex items-center justify-center gap-2"
                >
                  <Camera size={16} />
                  Capture
                </button>
              </div>
            </div>
          )}

          {/* Captured - Review */}
          {captureState === 'captured' && capturedImage && (
            <div className="space-y-4">
              <div className="rounded-xl overflow-hidden border border-border aspect-video bg-black">
                <img
                  src={capturedImage}
                  alt="Captured fingerprint"
                  className="w-full h-full object-cover"
                />
              </div>
              <p className="text-sm text-center text-muted-foreground">
                Review your fingerprint image and verify with NADRA
              </p>
              <div className="flex gap-3">
                <button
                  onClick={retake}
                  className="flex-1 border border-border text-foreground py-3 rounded-xl font-semibold hover:bg-muted transition-colors flex items-center justify-center gap-2"
                >
                  <RotateCcw size={16} />
                  Retake
                </button>
                <button
                  onClick={verifyFingerprint}
                  className="flex-1 bg-primary text-primary-foreground py-3 rounded-xl font-semibold hover:bg-primary/90 transition-colors flex items-center justify-center gap-2"
                >
                  <Fingerprint size={16} />
                  Verify with NADRA
                </button>
              </div>
            </div>
          )}

          {/* Verifying */}
          {captureState === 'verifying' && (
            <div className="text-center py-8 space-y-4">
              <div className="relative mx-auto w-20 h-20">
                <div className="absolute inset-0 rounded-full border-4 border-primary/20" />
                <div className="absolute inset-0 rounded-full border-4 border-primary border-t-transparent animate-spin" />
                <Fingerprint className="absolute inset-0 m-auto text-primary" size={32} />
              </div>
              <div>
                <p className="font-semibold text-foreground">Verifying with NADRA...</p>
                <p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground mt-1">
                  Comparing biometric data with NADRA records
                </p>
              </div>
            </div>
          )}

          {/* Verified */}
          {captureState === 'verified' && (
            <div className="text-center py-8 space-y-4">
              <div className="mx-auto w-20 h-20 bg-green-100 dark:bg-green-900/30 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center">
                <CheckCircle size={48} className="text-green-600 dark:text-green-400" />
              </div>
              <div>
                <p className="font-bold text-foreground text-lg">Fingerprint Verified!</p>
                <p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground mt-1">
                  Identity confirmed by NADRA. Proceeding with SIM registration...
                </p>
              </div>
            </div>
          )}

          {/* Failed */}
          {captureState === 'failed' && (
            <div className="text-center space-y-4">
              <div className="mx-auto w-20 h-20 bg-destructive/10 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center">
                <AlertCircle size={48} className="text-destructive" />
              </div>
              <div>
                <p className="font-bold text-foreground text-lg">Verification Failed</p>
                <p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground mt-1">{error}</p>
              </div>
              <button
                onClick={retake}
                className="w-full bg-primary text-primary-foreground py-3 rounded-xl font-semibold hover:bg-primary/90 transition-colors flex items-center justify-center gap-2"
              >
                <RotateCcw size={16} />
                Try Again
              </button>
            </div>
          )}
        </div>

        {/* Hidden canvas for capture */}
        <canvas ref={canvasRef} className="hidden" />
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}
```

  const handleAddressSubmit = async () => {
    setError('');
    if (!formData.deliveryAddress.trim()) {
      setError('Delivery address is required');
      return;
    }
    if (!formData.sameAddress && !formData.paymentAddress.trim()) {
      setError('Payment address is required');
      return;
    }
    
    setLoading(true);
    try {
      await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 1000));
      setCurrentStep('fingerprint'); // Go to fingerprint step before confirmation
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  };

  const handleFingerprintVerification = (verified: boolean, imageBase64: string) => {

      setFingerprintVerified(true);
      setFingerprintImage(imageBase64);
      setCurrentStep('confirmation');
    } else {
      setError('Fingerprint verification failed. Please try again.');
    }
  };

## Environment Variables Reference

````env
# filepath: backend/.env

# ─── SERVER ───────────────────────────────────────────

API_URL=http://localhost:3001

# ─── DATABASE ─────────────────────────────────────────

DB_PORT=5432

# ─── JWT / AUTH ────────────────────────────────────────

JWT_EXPIRY=1h
REFRESH_TOKEN_SECRET=your_refresh_token_secret_here
REFRESH_TOKEN_EXPIRY=7d
JWT_REFRESH_SECRET=your_jwt_refresh_secret_here
BCRYPT_ROUNDS=12

# ─── SESSION ──────────────────────────────────────────
SESSION_SECRET=your_session_secret_here
SESSION_EXPIRY=86400
SECURE_COOKIES=false

# ─── FABRIC (HYPERLEDGER) ─────────────────────────────
FABRIC_CA_URL=http://localhost:7054
FABRIC_CHANNEL_NAME=mychannel
FABRIC_CHAINCODE_NAME=simregistry

# ─── CORS / RATE LIMITING ─────────────────────────────

RATE_LIMIT_WINDOW_MS=900000
RATE_LIMIT_MAX_REQUESTS=100

# ─── SSL ──────────────────────────────────────────────

SSL_KEY_PATH=./certs/key.pem

# ─── FIREBASE (SERVER-SIDE) ───────────────────────────

FIREBASE_AUTH_DOMAIN=your_project.firebaseapp.com

# ─── SERVER URL ───────────────────────────────────────

````

````env

````

---

## Quick Notes

| Variable | Description |
|---|---|
| `PORT` | Main backend server port |
| `BCRYPT_ROUNDS` | Higher = more secure but slower (10–14 recommended) |
| `SECURE_COOKIES` | Set `true` in production (requires HTTPS) |
| `RATE_LIMIT_WINDOW_MS` | `900000` = 15 minutes |
| `FABRIC_GATEWAY_DISCOVERY` | Set `true` for dynamic peer discovery |
| `REACT_APP_ELECTRON_MODE` | `true` only when packaging as Electron desktop app |
| `FIREBASE_SERVICE_ACCOUNT_PATH` | Path to downloaded JSON from Firebase Console |

```
import React, { useState, useRef, useCallback } from 'react';
import {
  View,
  Text,
  StyleSheet,
  ScrollView,
  TouchableOpacity,
  TextInput,
  Alert,
  ActivityIndicator,
  Modal,
  Image,
} from 'react-native';
import { CameraView, CameraType, useCameraPermissions } from 'expo-camera';
import * as FileSystem from 'expo-file-system';
import AsyncStorage from '@react-native-async-storage/async-storage';
import axios from 'axios';
import Constants from 'expo-constants';

const API_URL =
  Constants.expoConfig?.extra?.apiUrl ||
  process.env.EXPO_PUBLIC_API_URL ||
  'http://10.0.2.2:3001'; // 10.0.2.2 = Android emulator localhost

type Step = 'select-network' | 'select-number' | 'address' | 'fingerprint' | 'confirmation';

const NETWORKS = ['Jazz', 'Zong', 'Telenor', 'Warid'];
const MOBILE_NUMBERS: Record<string, string[]> = {
  Jazz: ['03001234567', '03011234567', '03021234567', '03031234567'],
  Zong: ['03101234567', '03111234567', '03121234567', '03131234567'],
  Telenor: ['03201234567', '03211234567', '03221234567', '03231234567'],
  Warid: ['03301234567', '03311234567', '03321234567', '03331234567'],
};

export default function SIMRegistrationScreen({ navigation }: any) {
  const [step, setStep] = useState<Step>('select-network');
  const [formData, setFormData] = useState({
    network: '',
    mobileNumber: '',
    deliveryAddress: '',
    paymentAddress: '',
    sameAddress: true,
  });
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);
  const [error, setError] = useState('');
  const [showCamera, setShowCamera] = useState(false);
  const [capturedUri, setCapturedUri] = useState<string | null>(null);
  const [fingerprintVerified, setFingerprintVerified] = useState(false);
  const [verifyingFingerprint, setVerifyingFingerprint] = useState(false);
  const [confirmationData, setConfirmationData] = useState<{
    transactionId: string;
    trackingNumber: string;
  } | null>(null);

  const cameraRef = useRef<CameraView>(null);
  const [permission, requestPermission] = useCameraPermissions();

  // ─── Navigation ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  const goBack = () => {
    const backMap: Record<Step, Step | null> = {
      'select-network': null,
      'select-number': 'select-network',
      address: 'select-number',
      fingerprint: 'address',
      confirmation: 'fingerprint',
    };
    const prev = backMap[step];
    if (prev) setStep(prev);
    else navigation.goBack();
  };

  // ─── Step handlers ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  const handleNetworkSelect = (network: string) => {
    setFormData(prev => ({ ...prev, network, mobileNumber: '' }));
    setStep('select-number');
  };

  const handleNumberSelect = (number: string) => {
    setFormData(prev => ({ ...prev, mobileNumber: number }));
    setStep('address');
  };

  const handleAddressSubmit = () => {
    if (!formData.deliveryAddress.trim()) {
      setError('Delivery address is required');
      return;
    }
    if (!formData.sameAddress && !formData.paymentAddress.trim()) {
      setError('Payment address is required');
      return;
    }
    setError('');
    setStep('fingerprint');
  };

  // ─── Camera / Fingerprint ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
  const openCamera = async () => {
    if (!permission?.granted) {
      const result = await requestPermission();
      if (!result.granted) {
        Alert.alert(
          'Camera Permission',
          'Camera access is required for fingerprint capture. Please enable it in Settings.',
        );
        return;
      }
    }
    setShowCamera(true);
  };

  const capturePhoto = useCallback(async () => {
    if (!cameraRef.current) return;
    try {
      const photo = await cameraRef.current.takePictureAsync({
        quality: 0.8,
        base64: false,
      });
      setCapturedUri(photo!.uri);
      setShowCamera(false);
    } catch {
      Alert.alert('Error', 'Failed to capture image. Please try again.');
    }
  }, []);

  const verifyFingerprint = async () => {
    if (!capturedUri) return;
    setVerifyingFingerprint(true);
    setError('');

    try {
      const token = await AsyncStorage.getItem('accessToken');
      const raw = await AsyncStorage.getItem('user');
      const user = raw ? JSON.parse(raw) : null;

      if (!user?.cnic) {
        setError('User CNIC not found. Please log in again.');
        return;
      }

      // Convert image to base64
      const base64Image = await FileSystem.readAsStringAsync(capturedUri, {
        encoding: FileSystem.EncodingType.Base64,
      });

      const { data } = await axios.post(
        `${API_URL}/api/nadra/verify-fingerprint`,
        { cnic: user.cnic, fingerprintImage: base64Image },
        { headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` } },
      );

      if (data.verified) {
        setFingerprintVerified(true);
        setStep('confirmation');
      } else {
        setError(data.message || 'Fingerprint verification failed. Please retake.');
        setCapturedUri(null);
      }
    } catch (err: any) {
      setError(err.response?.data?.message || 'Verification failed. Please try again.');
    } finally {
      setVerifyingFingerprint(false);
    }
  };

  // ─── SIM Register ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  const handleConfirm = async () => {
    setLoading(true);
    setError('');
    try {
      const token = await AsyncStorage.getItem('accessToken');
      let base64Image = '';
      if (capturedUri) {
        base64Image = await FileSystem.readAsStringAsync(capturedUri, {
          encoding: FileSystem.EncodingType.Base64,
        });
      }

      const { data } = await axios.post(
        `${API_URL}/api/sim/register`,
        {
          networkProvider: formData.network,
          mobileNumber: formData.mobileNumber,
          deliveryAddress: formData.deliveryAddress,
          paymentAddress: formData.sameAddress ? formData.deliveryAddress : formData.paymentAddress,
          sameAddressForPayment: formData.sameAddress,
          fingerprintImage: base64Image,
        },
        { headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` } },
      );

      if (data.success) {
        setConfirmationData({
          transactionId: data.transaction?.transactionId || '',
          trackingNumber: data.transaction?.trackingNumber || '',
        });
      }
    } catch (err: any) {
      setError(err.response?.data?.error || 'SIM registration failed. Please try again.');
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  };

  // ─── Success screen ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  if (confirmationData) {
    return (
      <View style={styles.container}>
        <ScrollView contentContainerStyle={styles.scroll}>
          <View style={styles.card}>
            <Text style={styles.successIcon}>✅</Text>
            <Text style={styles.successTitle}>SIM Registered!</Text>
            <Text style={styles.successSub}>
              Your registration has been verified by NADRA and submitted successfully.
            </Text>
            <InfoRow label="Transaction ID" value={confirmationData.transactionId} />
            <InfoRow label="Tracking Number" value={confirmationData.trackingNumber} />
            <TouchableOpacity
              style={[styles.btn, { marginTop: 20 }]}
              onPress={() => navigation.navigate('HomeTab')}
            >
              <Text style={styles.btnText}>Go to Home</Text>
            </TouchableOpacity>
          </View>
        </ScrollView>
      </View>
    );
  }

  // ─── Camera Modal ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  return (
    <View style={styles.container}>
      <Modal visible={showCamera} animationType="slide" onRequestClose={() => setShowCamera(false)}>
        <View style={{ flex: 1, backgroundColor: '#000' }}>
          <CameraView ref={cameraRef} style={{ flex: 1 }} facing={'back' as CameraType}>
            {/* Guide overlay */}
            <View style={styles.overlay}>
              <View style={styles.guideCircle}>
                <Text style={{ fontSize: 48 }}>👆</Text>
              </View>
              <Text style={styles.guideText}>Place finger inside the circle and tap Capture</Text>
            </View>
          </CameraView>
          <View style={styles.camControls}>
            <TouchableOpacity style={styles.cancelBtn} onPress={() => setShowCamera(false)}>
              <Text style={{ color: '#fff', fontSize: 15 }}>Cancel</Text>
            </TouchableOpacity>
            <TouchableOpacity style={styles.captureBtn} onPress={capturePhoto}>
              <View style={styles.captureInner} />
            </TouchableOpacity>
            <View style={{ width: 80 }} />
          </View>
        </View>
      </Modal>

      <ScrollView contentContainerStyle={styles.scroll}>
        {/* Back button */}
        <TouchableOpacity onPress={goBack} style={styles.backRow}>
          <Text style={styles.backText}>← Back</Text>
        </TouchableOpacity>

        {error ? (
          <View style={styles.errorBox}>
            <Text style={styles.errorText}>⚠️ {error}</Text>
          </View>
        ) : null}

        {/* ── Select Network ── */}
        {step === 'select-network' && (
          <View style={styles.card}>
            <Text style={styles.title}>Select Network</Text>
            <Text style={styles.subtitle}>Choose your preferred mobile network</Text>
            {NETWORKS.map(n => (
              <TouchableOpacity key={n} style={styles.listBtn} onPress={() => handleNetworkSelect(n)}>
                <Text style={styles.listBtnText}>📡 {n}</Text>
              </TouchableOpacity>
            ))}
          </View>
        )}

        {/* ── Select Number ── */}
        {step === 'select-number' && (
          <View style={styles.card}>
            <Text style={styles.title}>Select Number</Text>
            <Text style={styles.subtitle}>Network: {formData.network}</Text>
            {(MOBILE_NUMBERS[formData.network] || []).map(num => (
              <TouchableOpacity key={num} style={styles.listBtn} onPress={() => handleNumberSelect(num)}>
                <Text style={styles.listBtnText}>📱 {num}</Text>
              </TouchableOpacity>
            ))}
          </View>
        )}

        {/* ── Address ── */}
        {step === 'address' && (
          <View style={styles.card}>
            <Text style={styles.title}>Delivery Address</Text>
            <Text style={styles.subtitle}>{formData.network} · {formData.mobileNumber}</Text>
            <TextInput
              style={styles.textArea}
              placeholder="Enter delivery address"
              placeholderTextColor="#999"
              multiline
              numberOfLines={4}
              value={formData.deliveryAddress}
              onChangeText={v => setFormData(p => ({ ...p, deliveryAddress: v }))}
            />
            <TouchableOpacity
              style={styles.checkRow}
              onPress={() => setFormData(p => ({ ...p, sameAddress: !p.sameAddress }))}
            >
              <Text style={styles.checkText}>
                {formData.sameAddress ? '☑' : '☐'} Payment address same as delivery
              </Text>
            </TouchableOpacity>
            {!formData.sameAddress && (
              <TextInput
                style={styles.textArea}
                placeholder="Enter payment address"
                placeholderTextColor="#999"
                multiline
                numberOfLines={4}
                value={formData.paymentAddress}
                onChangeText={v => setFormData(p => ({ ...p, paymentAddress: v }))}
              />
            )}
            <TouchableOpacity style={styles.btn} onPress={handleAddressSubmit}>
              <Text style={styles.btnText}>Continue →</Text>
            </TouchableOpacity>
          </View>
        )}

        {/* ── Fingerprint ── */}
        {step === 'fingerprint' && (
          <View style={styles.card}>
            <Text style={styles.title}>Biometric Verification</Text>
            <Text style={styles.subtitle}>
              NADRA requires your fingerprint to verify identity before issuing a SIM
            </Text>

            <View style={styles.fpBox}>
              {capturedUri ? (
                <>
                  <Image source={{ uri: capturedUri }} style={styles.fpImage} resizeMode="cover" />
                  {fingerprintVerified && (
                    <View style={styles.verifiedBadge}>
                      <Text style={styles.verifiedText}>✓ Verified by NADRA</Text>
                    </View>
                  )}
                </>
              ) : (
                <Text style={{ fontSize: 64 }}>👆</Text>
              )}
            </View>

            <Text style={styles.fpHint}>
              {capturedUri
                ? fingerprintVerified
                  ? 'Identity confirmed — proceed to confirm your order'
                  : 'Tap "Verify with NADRA" to confirm your identity'
                : 'Use the camera to capture your fingerprint image'}
            </Text>

            <View style={styles.row}>
              <TouchableOpacity
                style={[styles.outlineBtn, { flex: 1, marginRight: 8 }]}
                onPress={() => {
                  setCapturedUri(null);
                  setFingerprintVerified(false);
                  openCamera();
                }}
              >
                <Text style={styles.outlineBtnText}>
                  {capturedUri ? '🔄 Retake' : '📷 Open Camera'}
                </Text>
              </TouchableOpacity>

              {capturedUri && !fingerprintVerified && (
                <TouchableOpacity
                  style={[styles.btn, { flex: 1, marginLeft: 8, marginTop: 0 }]}
                  onPress={verifyFingerprint}
                  disabled={verifyingFingerprint}
                >
                  {verifyingFingerprint ? (
                    <ActivityIndicator color="#fff" />
                  ) : (
                    <Text style={styles.btnText}>Verify →</Text>
                  )}
                </TouchableOpacity>
              )}

              {fingerprintVerified && (
                <TouchableOpacity
                  style={[styles.btn, { flex: 1, marginLeft: 8, marginTop: 0 }]}
                  onPress={() => setStep('confirmation')}
                >
                  <Text style={styles.btnText}>Continue →</Text>
                </TouchableOpacity>
              )}
            </View>
          </View>
        )}

        {/* ── Confirmation ── */}
        {step === 'confirmation' && (
          <View style={styles.card}>
            <Text style={styles.title}>Order Summary</Text>
            <SummaryRow label="Network" value={formData.network} />
            <SummaryRow label="Number" value={formData.mobileNumber} />
            <SummaryRow label="Delivery" value={formData.deliveryAddress} />
            <SummaryRow label="NADRA" value="✓ Verified" highlight />
            <TouchableOpacity style={styles.btn} onPress={handleConfirm} disabled={loading}>
              {loading ? (
                <ActivityIndicator color="#fff" />
              ) : (
                <Text style={styles.btnText}>Confirm Registration</Text>
              )}
            </TouchableOpacity>
          </View>
        )}
      </ScrollView>
    </View>
  );
}

// ─── Small helper components ──────────────────────────────────────────────────
function SummaryRow({ label, value, highlight }: { label: string; value: string; highlight?: boolean }) {
  return (
    <View style={styles.summaryRow}>
      <Text style={styles.summaryLabel}>{label}</Text>
      <Text style={[styles.summaryValue, highlight && { color: '#16a34a' }]}>{value}</Text>
    </View>
  );
}

function InfoRow({ label, value }: { label: string; value: string }) {
  return (
    <View style={styles.summaryRow}>
      <Text style={styles.summaryLabel}>{label}</Text>
      <Text style={[styles.summaryValue, { fontFamily: 'monospace' }]}>{value}</Text>
    </View>
  );
}

// ─── Styles ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
const styles = StyleSheet.create({
  container: { flex: 1, backgroundColor: '#f5f5f5' },
  scroll: { padding: 16, paddingBottom: 48 },
  backRow: { marginBottom: 12 },
  backText: { color: '#3B2F8F', fontSize: 15, fontWeight: '600' },

  },

import React, { useState, useRef, useCallback } from 'react';
import {
  View,
  Text,
  StyleSheet,
  ScrollView,
  TouchableOpacity,
  TextInput,
  Alert,
  ActivityIndicator,
  Modal,
  Image,
} from 'react-native';
import { CameraView, CameraType, useCameraPermissions } from 'expo-camera';
import * as FileSystem from 'expo-file-system';
import AsyncStorage from '@react-native-async-storage/async-storage';
import axios from 'axios';
import Constants from 'expo-constants';

const API_URL =
  Constants.expoConfig?.extra?.apiUrl ||
  process.env.EXPO_PUBLIC_API_URL ||
  'http://10.0.2.2:3001';

type Step = 'select-network' | 'select-number' | 'address' | 'fingerprint' | 'confirmation';

const NETWORKS = ['Jazz', 'Zong', 'Telenor', 'Warid'];
const MOBILE_NUMBERS: Record<string, string[]> = {
  Jazz: ['03001234567', '03011234567', '03021234567', '03031234567'],
  Zong: ['03101234567', '03111234567', '03121234567', '03131234567'],
  Telenor: ['03201234567', '03211234567', '03221234567', '03231234567'],
  Warid: ['03301234567', '03311234567', '03321234567', '03331234567'],
};

export default function SIMRegistrationScreen({ navigation }: any) {
  const [step, setStep] = useState<Step>('select-network');
  const [formData, setFormData] = useState({
    network: '',
    mobileNumber: '',
    deliveryAddress: '',
    paymentAddress: '',
    sameAddress: true,
  });
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);
  const [error, setError] = useState('');
  const [showCamera, setShowCamera] = useState(false);
  const [capturedUri, setCapturedUri] = useState<string | null>(null);
  const [fingerprintVerified, setFingerprintVerified] = useState(false);
  const [verifyingFingerprint, setVerifyingFingerprint] = useState(false);
  const [confirmationData, setConfirmationData] = useState<{
    transactionId: string;
    trackingNumber: string;
  } | null>(null);

  const cameraRef = useRef<CameraView>(null);
  const [permission, requestPermission] = useCameraPermissions();

  const goBack = () => {
    const backMap: Record<Step, Step | null> = {
      'select-network': null,
      'select-number': 'select-network',
      address: 'select-number',
      fingerprint: 'address',
      confirmation: 'fingerprint',
    };
    const prev = backMap[step];
    if (prev) setStep(prev);
    else navigation.goBack();
  };

  const handleNetworkSelect = (network: string) => {
    setFormData(prev => ({ ...prev, network, mobileNumber: '' }));
    setStep('select-number');
  };

  const handleNumberSelect = (number: string) => {
    setFormData(prev => ({ ...prev, mobileNumber: number }));
    setStep('address');
  };

  const handleAddressSubmit = () => {
    if (!formData.deliveryAddress.trim()) {
      setError('Delivery address is required');
      return;
    }
    if (!formData.sameAddress && !formData.paymentAddress.trim()) {
      setError('Payment address is required');
      return;
    }
    setError('');
    setStep('fingerprint');
  };

  const openCamera = async () => {
    if (!permission?.granted) {
      const result = await requestPermission();
      if (!result.granted) {
        Alert.alert('Camera Permission', 'Camera access is required. Please enable it in Settings.');
        return;
      }
    }
    setShowCamera(true);
  };

  const capturePhoto = useCallback(async () => {
    if (!cameraRef.current) return;
    try {
      const photo = await cameraRef.current.takePictureAsync({ quality: 0.8, base64: false });
      setCapturedUri(photo!.uri);
      setShowCamera(false);
    } catch {
      Alert.alert('Error', 'Failed to capture. Please try again.');
    }
  }, []);

  const verifyFingerprint = async () => {
    if (!capturedUri) return;
    setVerifyingFingerprint(true);
    setError('');
    try {
      const token = await AsyncStorage.getItem('accessToken');
      const raw = await AsyncStorage.getItem('user');
      const user = raw ? JSON.parse(raw) : null;
      if (!user?.cnic) { setError('CNIC not found. Please log in again.'); return; }
      const base64Image = await FileSystem.readAsStringAsync(capturedUri, {
        encoding: FileSystem.EncodingType.Base64,
      });
      const { data } = await axios.post(
        `${API_URL}/api/nadra/verify-fingerprint`,
        { cnic: user.cnic, fingerprintImage: base64Image },
        { headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` } },
      );
      if (data.verified) {
        setFingerprintVerified(true);
        setStep('confirmation');
      } else {
        setError(data.message || 'Fingerprint not matched. Please retake.');
        setCapturedUri(null);
      }
    } catch (err: any) {
      setError(err.response?.data?.message || 'Verification failed. Try again.');
    } finally {
      setVerifyingFingerprint(false);
    }
  };

  const handleConfirm = async () => {
    setLoading(true);
    setError('');
    try {
      const token = await AsyncStorage.getItem('accessToken');
      let base64Image = '';
      if (capturedUri) {
        base64Image = await FileSystem.readAsStringAsync(capturedUri, {
          encoding: FileSystem.EncodingType.Base64,
        });
      }
      const { data } = await axios.post(
        `${API_URL}/api/sim/register`,
        {
          networkProvider: formData.network,
          mobileNumber: formData.mobileNumber,
          deliveryAddress: formData.deliveryAddress,
          paymentAddress: formData.sameAddress ? formData.deliveryAddress : formData.paymentAddress,
          sameAddressForPayment: formData.sameAddress,
          fingerprintImage: base64Image,
        },
        { headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` } },
      );
      if (data.success) {
        setConfirmationData({
          transactionId: data.transaction?.transactionId || '',
          trackingNumber: data.transaction?.trackingNumber || '',
        });
      }
    } catch (err: any) {
      setError(err.response?.data?.error || 'Registration failed. Please try again.');
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  };

  if (confirmationData) {
    return (
      <View style={styles.container}>
        <ScrollView contentContainerStyle={styles.scroll}>
          <View style={styles.card}>
            <Text style={styles.successIcon}>✅</Text>
            <Text style={styles.successTitle}>SIM Registered!</Text>
            <Text style={styles.successSub}>
              Registration verified by NADRA and submitted successfully.
            </Text>
            <InfoRow label="Transaction ID" value={confirmationData.transactionId} />
            <InfoRow label="Tracking Number" value={confirmationData.trackingNumber} />
            <TouchableOpacity style={[styles.btn, { marginTop: 20 }]} onPress={() => navigation.navigate('HomeTab')}>
              <Text style={styles.btnText}>Go to Home</Text>
            </TouchableOpacity>
          </View>
        </ScrollView>
      </View>
    );
  }

  return (
    <View style={styles.container}>
      <Modal visible={showCamera} animationType="slide" onRequestClose={() => setShowCamera(false)}>
        <View style={{ flex: 1, backgroundColor: '#000' }}>
          <CameraView ref={cameraRef} style={{ flex: 1 }} facing={'back' as CameraType}>
            <View style={styles.overlay}>
              <View style={styles.guideCircle}>
                <Text style={{ fontSize: 48 }}>👆</Text>
              </View>
              <Text style={styles.guideText}>Place finger inside the circle and tap Capture</Text>
            </View>
          </CameraView>
          <View style={styles.camControls}>
            <TouchableOpacity style={styles.cancelCamBtn} onPress={() => setShowCamera(false)}>
              <Text style={{ color: '#fff', fontSize: 15 }}>Cancel</Text>
            </TouchableOpacity>
            <TouchableOpacity style={styles.captureBtn} onPress={capturePhoto}>
              <View style={styles.captureInner} />
            </TouchableOpacity>
            <View style={{ width: 80 }} />
          </View>
        </View>
      </Modal>

      <ScrollView contentContainerStyle={styles.scroll}>
        <TouchableOpacity onPress={goBack} style={styles.backRow}>
          <Text style={styles.backText}>← Back</Text>
        </TouchableOpacity>

        {error ? <View style={styles.errorBox}><Text style={styles.errorText}>⚠️ {error}</Text></View> : null}

        {step === 'select-network' && (
          <View style={styles.card}>
            <Text style={styles.title}>Select Network</Text>
            <Text style={styles.subtitle}>Choose your preferred mobile network</Text>
            {NETWORKS.map(n => (
              <TouchableOpacity key={n} style={styles.listBtn} onPress={() => handleNetworkSelect(n)}>
                <Text style={styles.listBtnText}>📡  {n}</Text>
              </TouchableOpacity>
            ))}
          </View>
        )}

        {step === 'select-number' && (
          <View style={styles.card}>
            <Text style={styles.title}>Select Number</Text>
            <Text style={styles.subtitle}>Network: {formData.network}</Text>
            {(MOBILE_NUMBERS[formData.network] || []).map(num => (
              <TouchableOpacity key={num} style={styles.listBtn} onPress={() => handleNumberSelect(num)}>
                <Text style={styles.listBtnText}>📱  {num}</Text>
              </TouchableOpacity>
            ))}
          </View>
        )}

        {step === 'address' && (
          <View style={styles.card}>
            <Text style={styles.title}>Delivery Address</Text>
            <Text style={styles.subtitle}>{formData.network} · {formData.mobileNumber}</Text>
            <TextInput style={styles.textArea} placeholder="Delivery address" placeholderTextColor="#999"
              multiline numberOfLines={4} value={formData.deliveryAddress}
              onChangeText={v => setFormData(p => ({ ...p, deliveryAddress: v }))} />
            <TouchableOpacity style={styles.checkRow}
              onPress={() => setFormData(p => ({ ...p, sameAddress: !p.sameAddress }))}>
              <Text style={styles.checkText}>{formData.sameAddress ? '☑' : '☐'} Same address for payment</Text>
            </TouchableOpacity>
            {!formData.sameAddress && (
              <TextInput style={styles.textArea} placeholder="Payment address" placeholderTextColor="#999"
                multiline numberOfLines={4} value={formData.paymentAddress}
                onChangeText={v => setFormData(p => ({ ...p, paymentAddress: v }))} />
            )}
            <TouchableOpacity style={styles.btn} onPress={handleAddressSubmit}>
              <Text style={styles.btnText}>Continue →</Text>
            </TouchableOpacity>
          </View>
        )}

        {step === 'fingerprint' && (
          <View style={styles.card}>
            <Text style={styles.title}>Biometric Verification</Text>
            <Text style={styles.subtitle}>NADRA requires your fingerprint before issuing a SIM</Text>
            <View style={styles.fpBox}>
              {capturedUri
                ? <>
                    <Image source={{ uri: capturedUri }} style={styles.fpImage} resizeMode="cover" />
                    {fingerprintVerified && (
                      <View style={styles.verifiedBadge}><Text style={styles.verifiedText}>✓ Verified by NADRA</Text></View>
                    )}
                  </>
                : <Text style={{ fontSize: 64 }}>👆</Text>
              }
            </View>
            <Text style={styles.fpHint}>
              {capturedUri
                ? fingerprintVerified ? 'Identity confirmed — proceed to confirm your order'
                  : 'Tap "Verify with NADRA" to confirm your identity'
                : 'Tap "Open Camera" to capture your fingerprint'}
            </Text>
            <View style={styles.row}>
              <TouchableOpacity style={[styles.outlineBtn, { flex: 1, marginRight: 8 }]}
                onPress={() => { setCapturedUri(null); setFingerprintVerified(false); openCamera(); }}>
                <Text style={styles.outlineBtnText}>{capturedUri ? '🔄 Retake' : '📷 Open Camera'}</Text>
              </TouchableOpacity>
              {capturedUri && !fingerprintVerified && (
                <TouchableOpacity style={[styles.btn, { flex: 1, marginLeft: 8, marginTop: 0 }]}
                  onPress={verifyFingerprint} disabled={verifyingFingerprint}>
                  {verifyingFingerprint ? <ActivityIndicator color="#fff" /> : <Text style={styles.btnText}>Verify →</Text>}
                </TouchableOpacity>
              )}
              {fingerprintVerified && (
                <TouchableOpacity style={[styles.btn, { flex: 1, marginLeft: 8, marginTop: 0 }]}
                  onPress={() => setStep('confirmation')}>
                  <Text style={styles.btnText}>Continue →</Text>
                </TouchableOpacity>
              )}
            </View>
          </View>
        )}

        {step === 'confirmation' && (
          <View style={styles.card}>
            <Text style={styles.title}>Order Summary</Text>
            <SummaryRow label="Network" value={formData.network} />
            <SummaryRow label="Number" value={formData.mobileNumber} />
            <SummaryRow label="Delivery" value={formData.deliveryAddress} />
            <SummaryRow label="NADRA" value="✓ Verified" highlight />
            <TouchableOpacity style={styles.btn} onPress={handleConfirm} disabled={loading}>
              {loading ? <ActivityIndicator color="#fff" /> : <Text style={styles.btnText}>Confirm Registration</Text>}
            </TouchableOpacity>
          </View>
        )}
      </ScrollView>
    </View>
  );
}

function SummaryRow({ label, value, highlight }: { label: string; value: string; highlight?: boolean }) {
  return (
    <View style={styles.summaryRow}>
      <Text style={styles.summaryLabel}>{label}</Text>
      <Text style={[styles.summaryValue, highlight && { color: '#16a34a' }]}>{value}</Text>
    </View>
  );
}

function InfoRow({ label, value }: { label: string; value: string }) {
  return (
    <View style={styles.summaryRow}>
      <Text style={styles.summaryLabel}>{label}</Text>
      <Text style={[styles.summaryValue, { fontFamily: 'monospace' }]}>{value}</Text>
    </View>
  );
}

const styles = StyleSheet.create({
  container: { flex: 1, backgroundColor: '#f5f5f5' },
  scroll: { padding: 16, paddingBottom: 48 },
  backRow: { marginBottom: 12 },
  backText: { color: '#3B2F8F', fontSize: 15, fontWeight: '600' },
  errorBox: { backgroundColor: '#fee2e2', borderRadius: 10, padding: 12, marginBottom: 12, borderWidth: 1, borderColor: '#fca5a5' },
  errorText: { color: '#dc2626', fontSize: 13 },
  card: { backgroundColor: '#fff', borderRadius: 16, padding: 20, shadowColor: '#000', shadowOpacity: 0.07, shadowRadius: 8, elevation: 3 },
  title: { fontSize: 22, fontWeight: 'bold', color: '#1a1a2e', marginBottom: 4 },
  subtitle: { fontSize: 14, color: '#666', marginBottom: 20 },
  listBtn: { borderWidth: 1.5, borderColor: '#e0e0e0', borderRadius: 10, padding: 16, marginBottom: 10 },
  listBtnText: { fontSize: 16, fontWeight: '600', color: '#1a1a2e' },
  textArea: { borderWidth: 1, borderColor: '#e0e0e0', borderRadius: 10, padding: 12, fontSize: 14, color: '#1a1a2e', textAlignVertical: 'top', marginBottom: 12, minHeight: 100 },
  checkRow: { flexDirection: 'row', alignItems: 'center', marginBottom: 12 },
  checkText: { fontSize: 14, color: '#444' },

  outlineBtn: { backgroundColor: '#f0f0f0', borderRadius: 10, padding: 16, alignItems: 'center' },
  outlineBtnText: { color: '#1a1a2e', fontWeight: '600', fontSize: 14 },
  row: { flexDirection: 'row', marginTop: 12 },
  fpBox: { height: 180, backgroundColor: '#f0eeff', borderRadius: 12, borderWidth: 2, borderColor: '#3B2F8F33', borderStyle: 'dashed', alignItems: 'center', justifyContent: 'center', marginBottom: 12, overflow: 'hidden' },

  successTitle: { fontSize: 24, fontWeight: 'bold', color: '#1a1a2e', textAlign: 'center', marginBottom: 8 },
  successSub: { fontSize: 14, color: '#666', textAlign: 'center', marginBottom: 20 },
  overlay: { ...StyleSheet.absoluteFillObject, alignItems: 'center', justifyContent: 'center' },

  guideText: { color: '#fff', marginTop: 20, fontSize: 14, textAlign: 'center', paddingHorizontal: 32, backgroundColor: 'rgba(0,0,0,0.4)', padding: 8, borderRadius: 8 },

});

```
python3 -c "
import os
path = '/Users/muhammedabdurehman/Desktop/FYP/3rd Presentation/explora-app-ui/mobile/src/screens/SIMRegistrationScreen.tsx'
content = '''import React, { useState, useRef, useCallback } from 'react';
import {
  View,
  Text,
  StyleSheet,
  ScrollView,
  TouchableOpacity,
  TextInput,
  Alert,
  ActivityIndicator,
  Modal,
  Image,
} from 'react-native';
import { CameraView, CameraType, useCameraPermissions } from 'expo-camera';
import * as FileSystem from 'expo-file-system';
import AsyncStorage from '@react-native-async-storage/async-storage';
import axios from 'axios';
import Constants from 'expo-constants';

const API_URL =
  (Constants.expoConfig?.extra as any)?.apiUrl ||
  process.env.EXPO_PUBLIC_API_URL ||
  'http://10.0.2.2:3001';

type Step = 'select-network' | 'select-number' | 'address' | 'fingerprint' | 'confirmation';

const NETWORKS = ['Jazz', 'Zong', 'Telenor', 'Warid'];
const MOBILE_NUMBERS: Record<string, string[]> = {
  Jazz: ['03001234567', '03011234567', '03021234567', '03031234567'],
  Zong: ['03101234567', '03111234567', '03121234567', '03131234567'],
  Telenor: ['03201234567', '03211234567', '03221234567', '03231234567'],
  Warid: ['03301234567', '03311234567', '03321234567', '03331234567'],
};

export default function SIMRegistrationScreen({ navigation }: any) {
  const [step, setStep] = useState<Step>('select-network');
  const [formData, setFormData] = useState({
    network: '',
    mobileNumber: '',
    deliveryAddress: '',
    paymentAddress: '',
    sameAddress: true,
  });
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);
  const [error, setError] = useState('');
  const [showCamera, setShowCamera] = useState(false);
  const [capturedUri, setCapturedUri] = useState<string | null>(null);
  const [fingerprintVerified, setFingerprintVerified] = useState(false);
  const [verifyingFingerprint, setVerifyingFingerprint] = useState(false);
  const [confirmationData, setConfirmationData] = useState<{
    transactionId: string;
    trackingNumber: string;
  } | null>(null);

  const cameraRef = useRef<CameraView>(null);
  const [permission, requestPermission] = useCameraPermissions();

  const goBack = () => {
    const backMap: Record<Step, Step | null> = {
      'select-network': null,
      'select-number': 'select-network',
      address: 'select-number',
      fingerprint: 'address',
      confirmation: 'fingerprint',
    };
    const prev = backMap[step];
    if (prev) setStep(prev);
    else navigation.goBack();
  };

  const handleNetworkSelect = (network: string) => {
    setFormData(prev => ({ ...prev, network, mobileNumber: '' }));
    setStep('select-number');
  };

  const handleNumberSelect = (number: string) => {
    setFormData(prev => ({ ...prev, mobileNumber: number }));
    setStep('address');
  };

  const handleAddressSubmit = () => {
    if (!formData.deliveryAddress.trim()) { setError('Delivery address is required'); return; }
    if (!formData.sameAddress && !formData.paymentAddress.trim()) { setError('Payment address is required'); return; }
    setError('');
    setStep('fingerprint');
  };

  const openCamera = async () => {
    if (!permission?.granted) {
      const result = await requestPermission();
      if (!result.granted) {
        Alert.alert('Camera Permission', 'Camera access is required. Please enable it in Settings.');
        return;
      }
    }
    setShowCamera(true);
  };

  const capturePhoto = useCallback(async () => {
    if (!cameraRef.current) return;
    try {
      const photo = await cameraRef.current.takePictureAsync({ quality: 0.8, base64: false });
      setCapturedUri(photo!.uri);
      setShowCamera(false);
    } catch {
      Alert.alert('Error', 'Failed to capture. Please try again.');
    }
  }, []);

  const verifyFingerprint = async () => {
    if (!capturedUri) return;
    setVerifyingFingerprint(true);
    setError('');
    try {
      const token = await AsyncStorage.getItem('accessToken');
      const raw = await AsyncStorage.getItem('user');
      const user = raw ? JSON.parse(raw) : null;
      if (!user?.cnic) { setError('CNIC not found. Please log in again.'); return; }
      const base64Image = await FileSystem.readAsStringAsync(capturedUri, {
        encoding: FileSystem.EncodingType.Base64,
      });
      const { data } = await axios.post(
        \`\${API_URL}/api/nadra/verify-fingerprint\`,
        { cnic: user.cnic, fingerprintImage: base64Image },
        { headers: { Authorization: \`Bearer \${token}\` } },
      );
      if (data.verified) {
        setFingerprintVerified(true);
        setStep('confirmation');
      } else {
        setError(data.message || 'Fingerprint not matched. Please retake.');
        setCapturedUri(null);
      }
    } catch (err: any) {
      setError(err.response?.data?.message || 'Verification failed. Try again.');
    } finally {
      setVerifyingFingerprint(false);
    }
  };

  const handleConfirm = async () => {
    setLoading(true);
    setError('');
    try {
      const token = await AsyncStorage.getItem('accessToken');
      let base64Image = '';
      if (capturedUri) {
        base64Image = await FileSystem.readAsStringAsync(capturedUri, {
          encoding: FileSystem.EncodingType.Base64,
        });
      }
      const { data } = await axios.post(
        \`\${API_URL}/api/sim/register\`,
        {
          networkProvider: formData.network,
          mobileNumber: formData.mobileNumber,
          deliveryAddress: formData.deliveryAddress,
          paymentAddress: formData.sameAddress ? formData.deliveryAddress : formData.paymentAddress,
          sameAddressForPayment: formData.sameAddress,
          fingerprintImage: base64Image,
        },
        { headers: { Authorization: \`Bearer \${token}\` } },
      );
      if (data.success) {
        setConfirmationData({
          transactionId: data.transaction?.transactionId || '',
          trackingNumber: data.transaction?.trackingNumber || '',
        });
      }
    } catch (err: any) {
      setError(err.response?.data?.error || 'Registration failed. Please try again.');
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  };

  if (confirmationData) {
    return (
      <View style={styles.container}>
        <ScrollView contentContainerStyle={styles.scroll}>
          <View style={styles.card}>
            <Text style={styles.successIcon}>SUCCESS</Text>
            <Text style={styles.successTitle}>SIM Registered!</Text>
            <Text style={styles.successSub}>Verified by NADRA and submitted successfully.</Text>
            <View style={styles.summaryRow}><Text style={styles.summaryLabel}>Transaction ID</Text><Text style={styles.summaryValue}>{confirmationData.transactionId}</Text></View>
            <View style={styles.summaryRow}><Text style={styles.summaryLabel}>Tracking Number</Text><Text style={styles.summaryValue}>{confirmationData.trackingNumber}</Text></View>
            <TouchableOpacity style={[styles.btn, { marginTop: 20 }]} onPress={() => navigation.navigate('HomeTab')}>
              <Text style={styles.btnText}>Go to Home</Text>
            </TouchableOpacity>
          </View>
        </ScrollView>
      </View>
    );
  }

  return (
    <View style={styles.container}>
      <Modal visible={showCamera} animationType=\"slide\" onRequestClose={() => setShowCamera(false)}>
        <View style={{ flex: 1, backgroundColor: '#000' }}>
          <CameraView ref={cameraRef} style={{ flex: 1 }} facing={'back' as CameraType}>
            <View style={styles.overlay}>
              <View style={styles.guideCircle}>
                <Text style={{ fontSize: 48 }}>FP</Text>
              </View>
              <Text style={styles.guideText}>Place finger inside the circle and tap Capture</Text>
            </View>
          </CameraView>
          <View style={styles.camControls}>
            <TouchableOpacity style={styles.cancelCamBtn} onPress={() => setShowCamera(false)}>
              <Text style={{ color: '#fff', fontSize: 15 }}>Cancel</Text>
            </TouchableOpacity>
            <TouchableOpacity style={styles.captureBtn} onPress={capturePhoto}>
              <View style={styles.captureInner} />
            </TouchableOpacity>
            <View style={{ width: 80 }} />
          </View>
        </View>
      </Modal>

      <ScrollView contentContainerStyle={styles.scroll}>
        <TouchableOpacity onPress={goBack} style={styles.backRow}>
          <Text style={styles.backText}>Back</Text>
        </TouchableOpacity>
        {error ? <View style={styles.errorBox}><Text style={styles.errorText}>{error}</Text></View> : null}

        {step === 'select-network' && (
          <View style={styles.card}>
            <Text style={styles.title}>Select Network</Text>
            <Text style={styles.subtitle}>Choose your preferred mobile network</Text>
            {NETWORKS.map(n => (
              <TouchableOpacity key={n} style={styles.listBtn} onPress={() => handleNetworkSelect(n)}>
                <Text style={styles.listBtnText}>{n}</Text>
              </TouchableOpacity>
            ))}
          </View>
        )}

        {step === 'select-number' && (
          <View style={styles.card}>
            <Text style={styles.title}>Select Number</Text>
            <Text style={styles.subtitle}>Network: {formData.network}</Text>
            {(MOBILE_NUMBERS[formData.network] || []).map(num => (
              <TouchableOpacity key={num} style={styles.listBtn} onPress={() => handleNumberSelect(num)}>
                <Text style={styles.listBtnText}>{num}</Text>
              </TouchableOpacity>
            ))}
          </View>
        )}

        {step === 'address' && (
          <View style={styles.card}>
            <Text style={styles.title}>Delivery Address</Text>
            <Text style={styles.subtitle}>{formData.network} - {formData.mobileNumber}</Text>
            <TextInput
              style={styles.textArea} placeholder=\"Delivery address\" placeholderTextColor=\"#999\"
              multiline numberOfLines={4} value={formData.deliveryAddress}
              onChangeText={v => setFormData(p => ({ ...p, deliveryAddress: v }))}
            />
            <TouchableOpacity style={styles.checkRow} onPress={() => setFormData(p => ({ ...p, sameAddress: !p.sameAddress }))}>
              <Text style={styles.checkText}>{formData.sameAddress ? '[X]' : '[ ]'} Same address for payment</Text>
            </TouchableOpacity>
            {!formData.sameAddress && (
              <TextInput
                style={styles.textArea} placeholder=\"Payment address\" placeholderTextColor=\"#999\"
                multiline numberOfLines={4} value={formData.paymentAddress}
                onChangeText={v => setFormData(p => ({ ...p, paymentAddress: v }))}
              />
            )}
            <TouchableOpacity style={styles.btn} onPress={handleAddressSubmit}>
              <Text style={styles.btnText}>Continue</Text>
            </TouchableOpacity>
          </View>
        )}

        {step === 'fingerprint' && (
          <View style={styles.card}>
            <Text style={styles.title}>Biometric Verification</Text>
            <Text style={styles.subtitle}>NADRA requires your fingerprint before issuing a SIM</Text>
            <View style={styles.fpBox}>
              {capturedUri ? (
                <>
                  <Image source={{ uri: capturedUri }} style={styles.fpImage} resizeMode=\"cover\" />
                  {fingerprintVerified && (
                    <View style={styles.verifiedBadge}><Text style={styles.verifiedText}>Verified by NADRA</Text></View>
                  )}
                </>
              ) : (
                <Text style={{ fontSize: 40, color: '#3B2F8F' }}>FINGERPRINT</Text>
              )}
            </View>
            <Text style={styles.fpHint}>
              {capturedUri
                ? (fingerprintVerified ? 'Identity confirmed - proceed to confirm your order' : 'Tap Verify with NADRA to confirm your identity')
                : 'Tap Open Camera to capture your fingerprint'}
            </Text>
            <View style={styles.row}>
              <TouchableOpacity
                style={[styles.outlineBtn, { flex: 1, marginRight: 8 }]}
                onPress={() => { setCapturedUri(null); setFingerprintVerified(false); openCamera(); }}>
                <Text style={styles.outlineBtnText}>{capturedUri ? 'Retake' : 'Open Camera'}</Text>
              </TouchableOpacity>
              {capturedUri && !fingerprintVerified && (
                <TouchableOpacity
                  style={[styles.btn, { flex: 1, marginLeft: 8, marginTop: 0 }]}
                  onPress={verifyFingerprint} disabled={verifyingFingerprint}>
                  {verifyingFingerprint ? <ActivityIndicator color=\"#fff\" /> : <Text style={styles.btnText}>Verify</Text>}
                </TouchableOpacity>
              )}
              {fingerprintVerified && (
                <TouchableOpacity
                  style={[styles.btn, { flex: 1, marginLeft: 8, marginTop: 0 }]}
                  onPress={() => setStep('confirmation')}>
                  <Text style={styles.btnText}>Continue</Text>
                </TouchableOpacity>
              )}
            </View>
          </View>
        )}

        {step === 'confirmation' && (
          <View style={styles.card}>
            <Text style={styles.title}>Order Summary</Text>
            <View style={styles.summaryRow}><Text style={styles.summaryLabel}>Network</Text><Text style={styles.summaryValue}>{formData.network}</Text></View>
            <View style={styles.summaryRow}><Text style={styles.summaryLabel}>Number</Text><Text style={styles.summaryValue}>{formData.mobileNumber}</Text></View>
            <View style={styles.summaryRow}><Text style={styles.summaryLabel}>Delivery</Text><Text style={styles.summaryValue}>{formData.deliveryAddress}</Text></View>
            <View style={styles.summaryRow}><Text style={styles.summaryLabel}>NADRA</Text><Text style={[styles.summaryValue, { color: '#16a34a' }]}>Verified</Text></View>
            <TouchableOpacity style={styles.btn} onPress={handleConfirm} disabled={loading}>
              {loading ? <ActivityIndicator color=\"#fff\" /> : <Text style={styles.btnText}>Confirm Registration</Text>}
            </TouchableOpacity>
          </View>
        )}
      </ScrollView>
    </View>
  );
}

const styles = StyleSheet.create({
  container: { flex: 1, backgroundColor: '#f5f5f5' },
  scroll: { padding: 16, paddingBottom: 48 },
  backRow: { marginBottom: 12 },
  backText: { color: '#3B2F8F', fontSize: 15, fontWeight: '600' },
  errorBox: { backgroundColor: '#fee2e2', borderRadius: 10, padding: 12, marginBottom: 12 },
  errorText: { color: '#dc2626', fontSize: 13 },
  card: { backgroundColor: '#fff', borderRadius: 16, padding: 20, elevation: 3 },
  title: { fontSize: 22, fontWeight: 'bold', color: '#1a1a2e', marginBottom: 4 },
  subtitle: { fontSize: 14, color: '#666', marginBottom: 20 },
  listBtn: { borderWidth: 1.5, borderColor: '#e0e0e0', borderRadius: 10, padding: 16, marginBottom: 10 },
  listBtnText: { fontSize: 16, fontWeight: '600', color: '#1a1a2e' },
  textArea: { borderWidth: 1, borderColor: '#e0e0e0', borderRadius: 10, padding: 12, fontSize: 14, color: '#1a1a2e', textAlignVertical: 'top', marginBottom: 12, minHeight: 100 },
  checkRow: { flexDirection: 'row', alignItems: 'center', marginBottom: 12 },
  checkText: { fontSize: 14, color: '#444' },

2. **Real Backend APIs** built with:

   - NADRA verification routes (proxy to mock server)
   - User profile management

## What We Have

| Component | Type | Purpose |
|---|---|---|
| NADRA Mock Server | **Simulated API** | Mimics Pakistan's NADRA system for testing |
| Backend Routes | **Real APIs** | Handle auth, SIM registration, user management |
| Database | **PostgreSQL** | Stores user data, SIM records, audit logs |
| Blockchain | **Hyperledger Fabric** | Immutable transaction ledger |

**Web scraping** would be extracting data from websites, which we didn't do. Instead, we built a **mock API** that simulates NADRA's responses for development/testing purposes.
